task: Explain how architecture choices affect groundedness in RAG.

tool_calls.input: Explain how architecture choices affect groundedness in RAG.
Explain how architecture choices affect groundedness in RAG.
tool_calls.output: Architecture choices significantly impact groundedness. For instance, query rewriting and reranking can improve retrieval quality but may increase computational cost (chunk_3).
